question: Will Inter Milan win the UEFA Champions League?
resolution_criteria:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Inter Milan wins the 2024-25 UEFA Champions League. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2024-2025 UEFA Champions League based on the rules of the tournament (e.g. they are eliminated), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.
